pr.title: chore: merge all Dependabot dependency updates
pr.body:
## Description

Merges all 6 Dependabot branches into main:

- **Docker**: `node:20-alpine` → `node:26-alpine`
- **GitHub Actions**:
  - `actions/checkout` v4 → v6
  - `actions/setup-node` v4 → v6
  - `docker/build-push-action` v5 → v7
  - `docker/login-action` v3 → v4
  - `docker/metadata-action` v5 → v6

## Type of Change

- [x] Dependencies update

## Module(s) Affected

- `Dockerfile`
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- `.github/workflows/docker-publish.yml`

## Checklist

- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with 0 errors
- [x] `npm run lint` passes with 0 errors
- [ ] Prisma schema updated (if applicable) — N/A
- [ ] Prisma client regenerated (if schema changed) — N/A
- [ ] Audit logging added for write operations — N/A
- [ ] Events emitted for relevant state changes — N/A
- [ ] New endpoints documented — N/A

## Testing

- `npx tsc --noEmit` — 0 errors
- `npm run lint` — 0 errors, 50 warnings (unchanged)
- All changes are infrastructure/CI only, no source code modified

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/4b7274b6a00644f7b2ac3d1fa076b757
Requested by: @dev-crorx
